overall.description: A stationary first-person view of a large digital billboard on a skyscraper in a cyberpunk city, cycling through various glitch-art advertisements including a geisha, dragon, samurai warriors, and portraits. The scene features futuristic architecture under overcast skies, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with vibrant neon color grading.

high-rise building with grid-patterned windows that hosts the digital billboard
adjacent building with green-tinted windows and geometric facade patterns
vertical red structural beam running alongside the digital billboard
futuristic city buildings visible in the background distance

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady first-person view looking up at a massive digital billboard mounted on a skyscraper in a cyberpunk city. The billboard displays a colorful glitch-art image of a geisha against a red dotted background. Surrounding architecture includes a green-tinted building to the left and a red structural beam to the right, with an overcast sky visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street with large digital billboard

events.description: digital billboard transitions from geisha advertisement to purple dragon with glitch effects

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the digital billboard as it changes to the dragon advertisement

segments.scene_description: The scene remains static with the digital billboard now displaying a vibrant purple dragon with long whiskers against a cyan and pink striped background. The surrounding cyberpunk architecture and overcast lighting remain unchanged as the advertisement cycles.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street with large digital billboard

events.description: digital billboard transitions from dragon to single samurai warrior advertisement

agents.ego_description: observing the billboard as it displays the single warrior figure with sword

segments.scene_description: The digital billboard now shows a single samurai warrior in traditional armor holding a sword, rendered in purple and orange tones with heavy glitch artifacts. The camera maintains its fixed position viewing the urban canyon and the changing advertisement.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street with large digital billboard

events.description: digital billboard transitions to dual samurai warriors advertisement with yellow and red tones

agents.ego_description: observing the billboard displaying two samurai figures in ornate armor

segments.scene_description: The billboard content shifts to display two samurai warriors side by side, one with a horned helmet and another with an elaborate golden crown, set against a purple background with digital distortion effects. The surrounding buildings and cloudy sky remain constant.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street with large digital billboard

events.description: digital billboard transitions to yellow portrait advertisement with red text

agents.ego_description: observing the yellow-toned portrait advertisement with vertical red text

segments.scene_description: The digital billboard now displays a stylized yellow portrait of a man with glasses and short hair, featuring prominent vertical red Japanese text on the left side. The image exhibits heavy chromatic aberration and glitch artifacts typical of cyberpunk aesthetics.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street with large digital billboard

events.description: digital billboard transitions to Cyberhub profile advertisement with pink and cyan tones

agents.ego_description: observing the Cyberhub advertisement showing a profile view of a woman

segments.scene_description: The billboard changes to display a profile view of a woman with braided hair and cybernetic features, labeled 'CYBERHUB' at the top. The advertisement uses a split-color design with pink and cyan halves, continuing the glitch-art style of the previous displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street with large digital billboard

events.description: digital billboard cycles back to geisha advertisement completing the loop

agents.ego_description: observing the billboard as it returns to the initial geisha advertisement

segments.scene_description: The advertisement cycle completes as the billboard returns to the original geisha image with the red dot pattern background. The camera maintains its fixed perspective on the cyberpunk cityscape as the loop restarts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective of a massive digital billboard in a cyberpunk city as it cycles through a series of glitch-art advertisements. It begins with a colorful image of a geisha against a red dotted background, framed by a green-tinted building and a red structural beam under an overcast sky. As the display shifts, the imagery transforms into a vibrant purple dragon and then a single samurai warrior in purple and orange tones, before expanding to show two armored warriors against a distorted purple backdrop. The scene then transitions through a stylized yellow portrait with red Japanese text and a split-color profile of a cybernetic woman labeled CYBERHUB. Finally, the advertisement cycle completes as the billboard returns to the original geisha image, restarting the loop within the static urban canyon.
